contextual.title: Cardiovascular System in Obesity: Effect of Treatment
contextual.text:
Summary: To determine the long-term efficacy of the combination therapy of phentermine and fenfluramine in conjunction with diet, exercise, and behavior modification in the treatment of simple, moderate obesity.
Inclusion criteria: Men and women, ages 18 to 60. Body weight was 130 to 180 percent of ideal body weight.
Exclusion criteria:
